    • Uses of BaseDTO in com.rays.common

      Classes in com.rays.common with type parameters of type BaseDTO 
      Modifier and Type Class Description
      class  BaseCtl<T extends BaseDTO,​F extends BaseForm<T>,​S extends BaseServiceInt<T>>
      Base controller class for common REST operations like search, save, get, delete.
      interface  BaseDAOInt<T extends BaseDTO>
      Base Data Access Object interface providing common database operations.
      class  BaseForm<T extends BaseDTO>
      Base Form class for handling request data binding and DTO initialization.
      interface  BaseServiceInt<T extends BaseDTO>
      Base Service Interface providing common business logic operations.

    • Uses of BaseDTO in com.rays.common.impl

      Classes in com.rays.common.impl with type parameters of type BaseDTO 
      Modifier and Type Class Description
      class  BaseDAOImpl<T extends BaseDTO>
      Base Data Access Object implementation providing common database operations using JPA Criteria API.
      class  BaseServiceImpl<T extends BaseDTO,​D extends BaseDAOInt<T>>
      Base Service implementation providing common business logic operations with transaction management.
